organization.name: Consejo General de la Abogacía Española
organization.legalName: Consejo General de la Abogacía Española

evidence.label: EU eIDAS Trust List (Qualified Trust Service Provider)

organization.description: Consejo General de la Abogacía Española is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Spain. It provides digital trust services via acabogacia.org.
